name: Delayed symptoms from work accident in Taylorsville, does that hurt my claim?

mainEntity.name: Delayed symptoms from work accident in Taylorsville, does that hurt my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, medical link proves it; report when symptoms appear.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, if linked by medical opinion; Utah recognizes latent injuries like whiplash showing days later. Report when known.[1] Key factors: consistent history to doctors, imaging changes, timeline docs. Seek eval promptly, avoid gaps; specialist strengthens. Delays expected for some injuries.
